name: platform.claude.com /docs/en/
comment: Migrated from docs.claude.com on 2025-12-05. Consolidated single source for all English docs (about-claude, build-with-claude, agents-and-tools, agent-sdk, api, resources, test-and-evaluate). Previous 4 separate sources combined. CLI/PHP/Terraform SDK references excluded (SPA-only, no server-side content).

name: code.claude.com (docs-map-categories)
comment: Used to enrich index with hierarchical categories from official docs map. URLs from llms.txt, categories from here. Categories: Getting started, Build with Claude Code, Deployment, Administration, Configuration, Reference, Resources.

name: code.claude.com (llms-txt)
comment: Claude Code documentation via llms.txt discovery index. Grew from 46 to 64 URLs as of 2026-03. Timeout increased from 300s to 600s to accommodate growth (~8s/URL at peak).
